programme.desc: Jeff heads to Fairibault, Minnesota to check out the 4-Year-Old Bourbon Whiskey at 10,000 Drops Distillery.

programme.title: The Bourbon Pursuit Podcast
programme.desc: Is the era of the secret sourced bottle finally over or, are we just getting started? Explore the historical significance and evolution of contract distillation.

programme.title: The Human Experiment
programme.desc: A riveting documentary about chemicals being poured into our lives in various ways.

programme.title: Ending Real Fur
programme.desc: Playboy jewelry mogul turns anti-fur investigator. Also features fashion legend Tim Gunn.

programme.title: Life-extending, Anti-Aging Talk
programme.desc: NY Times bestselling author Dr. Michael Greger reveals... How Not to Age. Wouldn't you like to know?

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep114: Shark Divers Part 2
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Let's Take It Outside Ep108: Fish On…Cayman Islands International Fishing Tournament More Wild Cayman Adventures (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hop-aboard as we’re fishing the Cayman Islands International Fishing Tournament hoping to win big. In this episode you’ll also enjoy Cayman Yoga and Wellness Adventures plus plenty of fresh, fine dining.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep707: Paddling Poland
programme.desc: Facing Waves discovers the incredible culture, and explores the amazing landscapes around Mazury, Poland.

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter: Ice Fishing vs Propane
programme.desc: Ice Fishing vs. Propane In this episode, Mike takes a long-time AmeriGas employee out ice fishing and then learns the ins and outs of the world of residential propane! Stay tuned for the end and see how many fish were caught!

programme.title: Surfing Lifestyle Ep107: Hawaii’s North Shore…A Battle For The World Title
programme.desc: For two Australian surfers from the Gold Coast, best friends Mick Fanning and Joel Parkinson, it's been a long year of competition before arriving in the tropical waters of Hawaii. They're poised to battle it out for first place on the Championship Tour and the honor of being the World Champion. The North Shore of the island of Oahu is home to some of the best waves on the planet, and none more notorious than the Banzai pipeline.

programme.title: Blue World Ep811: Jojo the Friendly Dolphin + Gator Hole Cave in the Turks Caicos Islands
programme.desc: Jonathan, Blue World's host, and his enitre family travel to the Turks Caicos Islands in search of a famous local celebrity—Jojo the friendly dolphin. Then Blue World explores a hidden cave—keeping an eye out for the alligators, for which it’s named!

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep209: Boating New York City’s Waters with Scientist Neil deGrasse Tyson as Tour Guide
programme.desc: Water Ways TV's host, Steven Bull, cruises the waters of New York City with Neil deGrasse Tyson as his personal tour guide.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep114: Shark Divers Part 2
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Let's Take It Outside Ep108: Fish On…Cayman Islands International Fishing Tournament More Wild Cayman Adventures (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hop-aboard as we’re fishing the Cayman Islands International Fishing Tournament hoping to win big. In this episode you’ll also enjoy Cayman Yoga and Wellness Adventures plus plenty of fresh, fine dining.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 01
programme.desc: Elena Hight is one of the most accomplished women in snowboarding history. Interestingly, her passion for boardsports culture originated in her home state of Hawaii on the island of Kauai. This is where Elena’s Microdose series begins. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Papa Mike, Chris Owen, Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 03
programme.desc: At age 16, during the 2006 Torino Olympics, Elena Hight was the youngest American to compete in Women’s Halfpipe. In 2010, at the Vancouver Olympics, she sowed the seeds of change to come. In Episode 3 of Elena’s Microdose series we explore more. Featuring Selema Masekela, Papa Mike and Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 04
programme.desc: Failure in life can be our biggest teacher. In Episode 4 of her Microdose series, we learn how Elena Hight embraced failure on the global stage, embarked on transformative change, and unlocked her next level. Featuring Selema Masekela, Hana Beaman, Spencer O'Brien, Jamie Anderson, and Jeremy Jones.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 05
programme.desc: When Elena Hight made the surprising decision to set aside her Olympic routine to pursue backcountry riding, she astonished her peers and mentors. In Episode 5 of her Microdose series, we learn how and why Elena made the leap. Featuring Jeremy Jones, Hana Beaman, Todd Jones, and Jamie Anderson.

programme.title: Hwuy’xwet Pune’luxutth (Opening Penelakut)
programme.desc: This beautiful documentary follows a group of First Nation’s students at Penelakut Island Elementary School as they work with Riley McIntosh to create a new mountain bike trail for the community. Throughout the film, director Jason Mannings shares the history of Penelakut Island and its people.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: On The Verge
programme.desc: In the mountains behind the coastal town of Powell River, BC, rock climbers have spent decades quietly pioneering routes on some of the largest granite walls in Canada. As the landscape comes under threat of logging, the climbing community faces an uncertain future. Lives! Logs! Legacies!

programme.title: 12 Dogs Drive
programme.desc: Facing incredible physical and emotional challenges, a musher and his dog sled team travel from Churchill Manitoba, three thousand kilometres through the wilderness to their new home in Saint John, New Brunswick Canada.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Vivid
programme.desc: Absinthe Films’ Vivid highlights the breakout years of Travis Rice, Romain De Marchi, Nicolas Müller, and Gigi Rüf, delivering some of their most memorable early riding in a fan-favorite classic.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Scott Lenhardt
programme.desc: Artist Scott Lenhardt has kept everything he’s ever made for Burton Snowboards. Everything he’s ever done is stored in his childhood bedroom. After his year-long solo show at the Vermont Ski Snowboard Museum, he organized his archives. Just like his creative process, this film is mind blowing.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Sebo Walker
programme.desc: In 2022, the art-inspired accessories brand Slowtide launched a summer collection with Portland, Oregon-based artist and skateboarder Sebo Walker. To capture the collaboration, director Jake Price spent a day cruising around Walker’s hometown, seeing the city and learning what inspires his artwork.

programme.title: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: ‘Without a Paddle’ is a canoe film about snowboarding. Four snowboarders retrace a portion of the 19th century explorer David Thompson’s journey down the Columbia River, during one of the coldest cold snaps in Revelstoke’s recorded history. Surreal landscapes, epic paddling, deep powder, and pain.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Ted, being the original character he is, charmed and negotiated his way around the Midwest, the Northeast, and throughout the Central and Southern American states, buying and selling Classic Cars in the only way he knows how: by haggling and wheeling and dealing.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Because
programme.desc: A high-end freeski documentary following 22 professional athletes across record snowfall winters, facing deep powder, massive cliffs, and extreme expeditions, while sharing their ambition, discipline, and drive to reach the next level of their careers.

programme.title: Begging For Change
programme.desc: This movie is about the lives of strange and exhilarating men, begging for change, and living a life that is fast, cheap, and affordable. All the things that make up a great ski movie

programme.title: Chaiyo Premiere Tour
programme.desc: A skate documentary following a 10-day tour across Thailand, featuring demos and premieres in several cities, capturing the energy of local skate scenes and the passion of skaters coming together to celebrate.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: The Kayak Man
programme.desc: Another expedition? You must be crazy.This is what Beppe's friend told him when he decided to leave for North America. Even after paddling in the biggest rivers in the world, his desire for adventure was still not satisfied, and he went out looking for more. Dreaming of freedom, sleeping bags and nature, he ventured into the unknown to discover the Yukon and Teslin Rivers.For those unaware, the Yukon river is the major watercourse of the northwest of North America. It flows through the Canadian Yukon Territory and makes it's way to Alaska. The Teslin River is a bit shorter, but not for this reason less fun to dive into. They both offer an impressive scenery amidst cold temperatures, dangerous whitewaters and the wild nature of North America.The Kayak Man takes us on a journey of self discovery through the most beautiful landscapes of Canada and the United States while following the path of a brave kayaker that leaves his life behind in an attempt to explore new horizons by himself. An impressive trip that will not leave him the same way he was before.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: Discovering Karpathos - Part 2
programme.desc: We take a stroll down the village of Arkansa, in the middle of Karpathos. The village is loved by tourists who have been coming for over 20 years. Then, we are going to explore some of the ruins of the island, starting in the north in the ancient Vrikous. The island is filled with Ancient Greek ruins we cannot miss on before boarding on a windsurf experience. With the Meltemi wind, Karpathos has become a windsurfing paradise.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we focus on the French team. They dominated the KiteFoil World Series scene, with many great performances. We’ll zoom in on Axel Mazella who clinched the Kitefoil European title and his second Kitefoil World title last season. Finally, we meet four-time World Champion, Daniela Moroz, who’ll share some tips for how to gybe in the best possible way.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: We are finally back to action! After months of waiting due to the Covid-19 pandemic, athletes and sports enthusiasts had the chance to return to some high-end performances and demanding racing; for the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Team Relay European Championships that took place in Ebensee - Lake Traunsee, Austria. Relieve the best moments on Kite Masters.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 2: Kuwaiti Aspirations Therapeutic Riding
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we’re in Kuwait for a look at the country’s jumping community past and present, meeting the British woodsman using logging horses to minimise his impact on the environment, making a positive difference to the lives of disabled children in New Zealand with the help of therapy horses, and aiming for Tokyo with Mexican rider Francisco Pasquel.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Death Mask
programme.desc: Wilbur works in an old carnival and shows some gruesome things to the puplic. He covered his face because he had a sadistic father who burned his face. Everybody makes jokes about his scars and when the new boss fired him, he go to an old swamp-witch who gives him a peace of wood from a hanging tree and Wilbur makes a mask from this piece of wood and put all his anger in this mask. When he puts the mask on, everybody who looks on this mask commits suicide. He has created the Death-Mask.

programme.title: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Tom Sizemore and Eric Roberts in this tense thriller about two FBI agents who track down a missing person's case which leads them to a group of stock brokers who hunt people for sport.

programme.title: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful, young woman out on the town with friends is saved from the clutches of a serial rapist by an ancient but gorgeous vampire, but at what cost?

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E34 - Prince William And Prince Harry The Next Royal Generation
programme.desc: Prince William and Prince Harry, along with their friends, got as much media attention as today’s pop stars, fashion icons, and movie celebs. This documentary explores how this affected their personal lives and friendships, showcasing how they managed their fame alongside their royal responsibilities.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E38 - HM The Queen A Remarkable Life
programme.desc: The most notable woman in modern times has to be our Late Queen, Elizabeth II. She ruled for 70 years, the longest reign in British history. Once a princess who wasn't supposed to be queen, Elizabeth II led the country to thrive after World War II and became a steady presence in our changing world. In a thousand years of British monarchy, Elizabeth II is likely one of the most outstanding monarchs ever.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E04 - Battle Plans
programme.desc: Surviving in the wild often means being able to fight and win. This fighting strategy is called agonism and is used to set ranks, get resources, claim territory, and attract partners. There's no certainty in the wild, but animals that get good at agonism have a better shot at living to see another day.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E03 - Chasing The Big One
programme.desc: Montana wardens spend a week tracking the killer of two out-of-season deer; anonymous tips and eye witness accounts keep the wardens hot on a trail filled with many twists and turns.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E04 - Buggying Out
programme.desc: Fourth of July weekend in Silver Lake State Park is a non-stop party; Michigan conservation officers help patrol the park during this busy time and make keeping the peace their number one priority.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E02 - Moose is Loose and Lost Coast
programme.desc: A surprise guest shows up at the elementary school, giving everyone quite a scare. Meanwhile, a sneaky Angler is on the prowl, putting a twist on "catch and release." It's up to the Game Wardens to stop him.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E03 - Operation Long Tooth and Happy Kids
programme.desc: An elusive smuggler evades Game Wardens from different backgrounds. The smuggler, once discovered, has an exotic tusk in his possession. Then a story of how a dog and two amused kids leads to a bust. It's the job of Game Wardens to solve what has transpired.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S01:E01 - Meet Island Air
programme.desc: Thousands of outdoor adventure seekers flock to Kodiak Island to experience the wilds of Alaska through hunting, fishing and wildlife viewing expeditions, and Island Air Service makes those once-in-a-lifetime quests a reality. Flying in fog, rain, snow or sleet and moving outdoorsmen, locals, supplies and materials to the farthest corners of the island, It's all in a day's run for a Kodiak bush pilot and the staff and crew of Island Air.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S01:E02 - Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While on a routine sightseeing flight, a massive storm has the pilots fighting to keep their passengers safe.

programme.title: Black Panther – The Story of Emilie and Jacob
programme.desc: Siblings Emilie and Jacob cannot help feeling a deep love for each other. After being apart for many years, they meet in the mountains.

programme.title: Clumsy Little Acts of Tenderness
programme.desc: The Finnish short comedy by Miia Tervo portrays an anything but typical relationship between a loving father and his skeptical daughter.

programme.title: Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of three successful blind artists whose visual impairment has become the starting point for their visual explorations.

programme.title: Schmitke
programme.desc: What should have been a ordinary job in the Czech Ore Mountains, becomes a mysterious expedition for the aging engineer Julius Schmitke.

programme.title: Honey and Ashes
programme.desc: Naima, a doctor, Amina, a graduate, and Leila, a young student, are pursuing their individual routes to an independent life when their paths cross.

programme.title: Gisela
programme.desc: Authentic, haphazard and unromantic, three residents of a high-rise housing estate search for love, friendship and sexuality.

programme.title: I Knew You Were My Kind
programme.desc: The ghostly off-season on the Italian coast. Shortly before their journey home, caregivers Anca and Zoya meet at a bus stop and decide to visit a client's abandoned beach house. A fleeting day of vacation becomes a moment of solidarity and tenderness that challenges the structural norms that govern their daily lives.

programme.title: The Smoothness of Our Teeth
programme.desc: A family visit and a broken tooth raises universal questions about identity, origins and life choices.

programme.title: Stained Skin
programme.desc: Despite the adverse working conditions, two friends persevere with the power of their imagination and their will.

programme.title: Atlas

programme.title: Thirty the Series
programme.desc: Charlie, Bianca and Anna are on their way to see Dalia, who has fallen off the grid since becoming a mum. While Dalia tries to wrangle herself, a sick child and a grumpy husband.

programme.title: Thirty the Series

programme.title: Alien Rising

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Kansas City Confidential
programme.desc: A wrongfully accused ex-con hunts down the criminals behind a daring heist to clear his name and uncover the mastermind’s scheme.

programme.title: The Steel Claw
programme.desc: A disabled ex-Marine returns to WWII Philippines for a hazardous rescue mission, relying on a steel prosthetic hand and local guerrilla allies.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: There is panic throughout the nation as the dead suddenly come back to life.

programme.title: Hell's Angels
programme.desc: Two British brothers fly in WWI’s fiercest battles, face betrayal over a lover, and sacrifice everything amid sky-high spectacle and tragedy.

programme.title: Kentucky Rifle
programme.desc: While the wagon train forges ahead, a few people stay behind to repair a disabled rifle-filled wagon

programme.title: The Strange love of Martha Ivers
programme.desc: A man is reunited with his childhood friend and her husband, who believe he knows the truth about the death of her rich aunt years earlier

programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: A clumsy young man nurtures a plant and discovers that it's carnivorous, forcing him to kill to feed it

programme.title: His Girl Friday
programme.desc: A newspaper editor dosen't want his ex wife to remarry and he does everything in his powers to prevent it

programme.title: Tune Your Heart To Truth

programme.title: The Bread Is In Your Hands
programme.desc: In “The Bread Is In Your Hands,” Pastor Holly Furtick teaches us that having compassion is less about signing up to serve and more about serving those who are right in front of us.

programme.title: Arresting Anxiousness
programme.desc: Has anxiety been stealing your peace? Learn how to adjust the influence your circumstances have on your mindset and invite God’s presence in with your praise.

programme.title: The Prayer That Repairs
programme.desc: Don’t be so confused about the noise around you that you can’t hear the God who made you. When you’re faced with a struggle you didn’t see coming, remember that Jesus is already praying for you, and His prayer is stronger than any attack.

programme.title: Focus Your Faith
programme.desc: In “Focus Your Faith,” Pastor Steven Furtick shows us how the power of faith can transform our perspective.

programme.title: Not Here
programme.desc: Do you ever feel like your prayers are going unanswered? The enemy wants you to believe God’s not listening, but the truth is He hears you. His presence is with you in the mountains and the valleys, and He’s working one moment at a time.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto, narrates in detail what happened years ago. He lies blatantly, Torrealba thinks he wants to blame his wife for having been unfaithful to him. Camila reproaches Mother Isabel harshly. Rosa cannot appear because they want to kill her. Axel, disappointed because Amelia hid the paternity of his son from him.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel in conflict with his children. Camila defends them and tells him that her children are afraid of him. Max is willing to meet Rosa, even at the risk of his life and Camila organizes a party to unmask Elda.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Committed to forget Nicolás Del Casal, Victoria decides to reciprocate the love Sergio offers her, although Sergio believes that the young Guanipa is not yet ready to fall in love again. Florencia wants to make sure that Nicolás did not believe Victoria when she claimed to have been a victim of the late Rosendo Zapata, who in life wanted to abuse her. Hilario is overcome with sadness as he wanders through the nooks and crannies of the Cantarrana hacienda, where he remembers being a man that everyone respected and of whom now only the remains are left. At nightfall, Fernanda leans on Leopoldo to impose a punishment on his daughter Eugenia for having lied to him; Eugenia tries to manipulate her father, as she begs him to let her leave, but the young Alcoy is forced to stay at home. Nicolás is approached by his wife, who wants to attend an event that Nicolás refuses to go to, but suddenly changes his mind when he learns that the event is none other than the same art auction to which Sergio invited Victoria.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: In the middle of the art auction, the Del Casal couple has a furtive encounter with Victoria and Sergio; Florencia believes that Victoria is furious to see her with her beloved Nicolás, but Victoria clarifies that Nicolás is only with her for commitment and nothing else. Carlos Hansen shows up at Cantarrana to propose a deal to Hilario: he will move to another country with Adelaida if Guanipa signs the divorce; Hilario is not willing to accept without putting up a fight. Fernanda has made the decision to send her daughter Eugenia to a Swiss boarding school, because Yosmir's bad influence is what has caused the girl's rebellious attitudes. After having signed the divorce, Adelaida is happy because now she will be able to rebuild her life with Hansen, who lets her know that they will have to move to meet Hilario.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Claudio gives instructions to Pedro about the new plan to kill his brother. In an attempt to recover the million dollars that a third party collected with the stolen check, Ricardo and Paulina go before the bank manager who confirms that the operation was clean and cannot be reversed. Lorena receives a package from her husband.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Gertrudis plots a mass shooting for the party. Alberto is caught up in memories of the past, including a letter where Lorenita declared her love for him. At the Oceanography Institute, Isabel surprises Malena with a bouquet of flowers as a show of 'admiration' for her new appointment. Guillermo warns Lorena of the danger her son faces for having fled the Corona household without killing Marco Aurelio.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: In a mixture of enjoyment and pain, Pastora sees Cirilo's corpse lying in the morgue.

programme.desc: Ante una llamada telefónica de Rosa Blanco a Luciano, Camila, ilusionada, quiere hablar con su mamá. El Capitán Torrealba la ayude a entender los secretos que existen sobre el crimen. Ante la brutal agresión a Sebastián, Ezequiel quiere vengarla con Fernando, un Aragón.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia y María Amelia habían denunciado el crimen de la muerte de Leoncio. Torrealba las enfrenta pues quiere saber cómo fue que Rosa mató a Leoncio. Patricia, desesperada, bebe sin freno. Ante su descontrol, el detective, capcioso, duda de ella.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En las cartas que entregó Henry a Max, Rosa Blanco dice que le arrebataron a su hija y Camila, muy ansiosa, cree que, al fin sabrá por qué su mamá la abandonó. Marcelina encuentra la caja con las cartas y al saber el contenido, alterada, ordena que las quemen.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cartas contienen pruebas que incriminan a Patricia y a Fausto en el asesinato de Leoncio. Camila tomará decisiones importantes, sobre todo para encontrar las cuatro mujeres que traicionaron a su mamá. Fausto tiene una grave intención: hay que matar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en saber sobre su relación familiar, piensa que pueda ser prima de Max. Ezequiel quiere despejar la duda de que podría ser su sobrina, interroga a la Madre Isabel que niega saberlo y también recurre a Marcelina que se lo confirma. Camila, protege a Chantal, una niña que vende flores.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: Vigilia
programme.desc: Santiago amanece desnudo y golpeado en medio del desierto. El joven se incorpora muy aturdido y retorna a su casa paterna.

programme.title: ¿Quieres Ser Mi Rehén?
programme.desc: Ulises, un diseñador publicitario, es tomado como rehén por una hermosa y misteriosa mujer en el día más importante de su vida y en su propia oficina. Al mismo tiempo, la exesposa de Ulises acude a su oficina y complica todavía más la situación.

programme.title: Cartero
programme.desc: Hernán Sosa es un joven tímido que viene del interior a la ciudad. En su pueblo siempre estuvo enamorado de una chica inalcanzable, Yanina. Hernán consigue trabajo en el correo. Durante el reparto, Hernán descubre que Yanina se encuentra en la ciudad, en la zona de su reparto. En consecuencia, comienza a desplegar sus nuevos conocimientos de cartero para llegar hasta ella. Pero a medida que se acerca, descubre que unos viejos carteros están organizando un robo en el mismo edificio donde trabaja Yanina. Envalentonado por la fuerza del amor, Hernán se enfrentará a los peligros que rodean a Yanina para llegar a declararle lo que siente.

programme.title: [object Object]
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Vidas Violentas
programme.desc: integrada por seis cortometrajes escritos y dirigidos por seis de los más connotados directores mexicanos, la película fue realizada y dirigida para concientizar y reducir la violencia de género, el acoso escolar en las escuelas y la violencia doméstica. Proviene de una iniciativa del gobierno en el marco de la campaña basta no violencia

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
